## Pull Request: Quality Control Checklist

### 📋 Issue Reference
- **Closes issue:** #<!-- issue number -->
- **Issue Title:** <!-- reference the issue title -->
- **Issue Type:** [ ] Bug Fix [ ] Feature [ ] Chore [ ] Refactor

---

### ✅ Acceptance Criteria Validation

**I have verified this PR fulfills ALL acceptance criteria from the issue:**

- [ ] I have reviewed the issue's acceptance criteria
- [ ] All acceptance criteria are met and testable
- [ ] I have documented any deviations or unmet criteria below

**If criteria are NOT fully met:**
<!-- Explain what is not met and why -->

---

### 🔗 Related Issues & Stories

**If this is a bug fix:**
- [ ] Bug has steps to reproduce documented in the issue
- [ ] Linked to affected story/feature (if applicable): #<!-- issue number -->

**If this is a feature:**
- [ ] Issue includes clear acceptance criteria
- [ ] Any blocking issues are referenced

---

### 🧪 Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated (backend)
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated (backend)
- [ ] E2E tests added/updated (frontend)
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Test results documented or screenshot attached

**Test Coverage:**
<!-- Describe what was tested -->

---

### 📝 Changes Summary

**What changed and why:**
<!-- Concise explanation of changes -->

**Key files modified:**
<!-- List main files changed -->

---

### 🔍 Review Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] No breaking changes introduced
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Database migrations tested (if applicable)
- [ ] Environment variables documented (if needed)

---

### ⚠️ Potential Issues

**Any concerns or areas needing special attention:**
<!-- Leave blank if none -->

---

### 📌 Notes for Reviewers
<!-- Any additional context for the review -->
